jobs.name: news-intel-morning
jobs.description: Daily morning semiconductor news intel collection

payload.message:
export GITHUB_TOKEN=$(cat /root/.github_token) && git remote set-url origin https://${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/Jareddeng/memory-visualization-dashboard.git

Read docs/news-intel-cron-brief.md for full rules. Then collect semiconductor news intel and write to content/intel/clawbot_intel.json.

CRITICAL: DO NOT load entire file content into prompt. Use Python/grep scripts for dedupe checks only.

After write: run `node scripts/generate-data.mjs`. After push: verify with `git log origin/main --oneline -3` and `git status`.

state.lastError: Context overflow: prompt too large for the model. Try /reset (or /new) to start a fresh session, or use a larger-context model.
